channel.title: New local problems on FixMyStreet
channel.description: The latest local problems reported by users

item.title: Dead fox outside 10 Shoreham Way, 18th May
item.description:
Dea fox

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Shoreham Way, Hayes, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Overflowing bin, 18th May
item.description:
Three months were every morning and evening th vin has been overflowing onto street

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Victoria Park Road, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Blocked parking space on Ennersdale Road, 18th May
item.description:
The owners of 1a Ennersdale Road continually block the CPZ spaces on Ennersdale Road with cones and barriers to ensure access to their lock up, despite their not being a crossover/dropped curb for this purpose

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 1, Ennersdale Road, Hither Green, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Graffiti on cycle shed, 18th May
item.description:
Graffiti on cycle shed

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Dawson's Hill Footpath (Overhill Road to Bredinghurst), East Dulwich, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Dumped mattress and large tv, 18th May
item.description:
A mattress, a large tv and other smaller items have been dumped on the pavement. These items have been there for approximately 5 days.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Howarth Road, Abbey Wood
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Mattress and bed head, 18th May
item.description:
One of my neighbours keeps dumping mattresses on the road we think it’s number 31

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Hillcourt Road, East Dulwich, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Tree outside 119 Blackstock Road, 18th May
item.description:
The tree is of considerable size and its proximity to adjoining buildings raises serious structural concerns. Its canopy and root system risk causing damage to foundations, walls, and roof structures. It also substantially obstructs natural light to neighb
Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Blackstock Road, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: 2 Lime Bikes in Lemmon Road alleyway, 18th May
item.description:
There have been 2 Lime bikes in the alleyway next to 29 Lemmon Road for the last couple of weeks. I've reported it to Lime twice, but they haven't done anything.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 29, Lemmon Road, East Greenwich, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Kilburn bridge pub Brondesbury villas, 18th May
item.description:
Mattress

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Brondesbury Villas, London
Report on FixMyStreet
item.category: Fly-tip Medium - Up to medium size van load

item.title: Seriously damaged Vehicle, 18th May
item.description:
This, seriously damaged, VW Camper Van has been smashed up and abandoned now for over 6 months. The council is aware of the owner and should commence removal proceedings.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Limewood Road, Northumberland Heath, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Sofa on side of road, 18th May
item.description:
Fly tipping, whole sofa, on side of road

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Broad Walk, Kidbrooke
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: 58 Brondesbury villas, 18th May
item.description:
Chair

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Brondesbury Villas, London
Report on FixMyStreet
item.category: Fly-tip Small - Less than one bag

item.title: Abandoned rubbish bin, 18th May
item.description:
Abandoned black bin left on corner of Ancaster and Alabama Street. It's not linked to the houses nearby. People are leaving their litter in it and it's not being removed by collection people. Please can Greenwich council remove the bin entirely.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Alabama Street, Plumstead
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Excessive Growth on Trees, 18th May
item.description:
Please can the trees in Beverley Rd have the shoots around the base trimmed back. Many thanks

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Beverley Road, Barnehurst, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Abandoned aldi trolley, 18th May
item.description:
Dumped today

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Hither Green Lane, Hither Green, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Stickers on multiple lamposts, 18th May
item.description:
Stickers on multiple lampposts. This has happened more than once now. The flags in this area are also on the verge of causing an accident with how tattered they’ve been left to come. Seems like if a strong wind comes, it might blow one into a car and cause an accident.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 300, Erith Road, Barnehurst, Bexleyheath, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Dumped Nitrous Oxide Canisters, 18th May
item.description:
A large amount of Nitrous Oxide canisters have been dumped next to the lay by on the approach road into Bursted Woods approx 40 plus boxes. Please can they be removed.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Erith Road, Barnehurst, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet
